calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Petitioner Sufen Liang was present in pro per, as Guardian ad litem for the minor, Xiang Jian Zhou, a/k/a XingJian Zhou.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Charles J. Zhang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Nathan Jianxing Zhou.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Reset To Nov-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Sufen Liang was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Xing Jian Zhou, a/k/a Xingjian Zhou.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Charles J. Zhang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with the proposed change of name of the minor as there is no indication in the case file that the minor's father was noticed of today's hearing. Good cause appearing, the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to November 20, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218. No further publication is required by petitioner.
